name: CLX - MGA Insurance License Verification v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. advisor or mga_principal session. Encrypts license_number (AES-GCM via crypto), stores last 4 + encrypted blob to advisor_licenses (vertical_id='insurance'). PDF documentation_url assumed pre-uploaded to R2 via separate signed-URL flow. Schedules renewal reminders via daily monitor (B4.1). Phase 5b adds Certn background-check kickoff.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', advisor_id: $json.advisor_id, license_type: $json.license_type, license_number_encrypted: $json.license_number_encrypted, license_number_last4: $json.license_number_last4, jurisdiction: $json.jurisdiction, issued_date: $json.issued_date, expires_date: $json.expires_date, renewal_status: 'current', ce_hours_required: $json.ce_hours_required, ce_hours_completed: 0, ce_period_start: $json.ce_period_start, ce_period_end: $json.ce_period_end, documentation_url: $json.documentation_url, verified_at: new Date().toISOString(), verified_by: $json.verifier_id }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ license_verified: true, steps_completed: { account_created: true, license_uploaded: true } }) }}

nodes.name: Update Onboarding
nodes.notes: Note: PATCH with jsonb merge would be ideal; current pattern overwrites steps_completed. Phase 5b adds RPC for atomic merge.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', event_type: 'license_verified', advisor_id: $('Encrypt License').item.json.advisor_id, performed_by_user_id: $('Encrypt License').item.json.verifier_id, performed_by_role: 'advisor', event_data: { license_type: $('Encrypt License').item.json.license_type, jurisdiction: $('Encrypt License').item.json.jurisdiction, license_last4: $('Encrypt License').item.json.license_number_last4, expires_date: $('Encrypt License').item.json.expires_date }, occurred_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ (() => { const ins = $('Insert License').item.json; const row = Array.isArray(ins) ? ins[0] : ins; return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, vertical_id: 'insurance', license_id: row && row.id, license_number_last4: row && row.license_number_last4, expires_date: row && row.expires_date }); })() }}
